full_text:
Sima Quan 司馬權
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Quan (司馬權). Son of Sima Kui, he was enfeoffed as a King upon Sima Yan becoming Emperor. Sima Quan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
